name: Senolytics surveillance pass for May 30, 2026

scope.question: What changed for senolytics since the last meaningful review or publication, and does any change justify a public update?

summary: No material delta was found beyond contextual trial-watch noise, so the public layer did not change.
notes: Recent monitoring turned up no new human-functional result that would alter the current outlook.
The next useful pass should wait for a posted result or publication.
next_actions: Recheck on the next surveillance rotation.
Keep trial-watch activity separate from efficacy claims.
